sectionBMissingPolicy.descriptionTemplate: No policy found for {{name}}. BRSR requires a board-approved policy for each NGRBC principle.
sectionBMissingPolicy.suggestedActionTemplate: Draft and get board approval for a {{shortName}} policy. Publish on company website and link in BRSR report.

sectionBNotApproved.descriptionTemplate: Policy exists but lacks board approval. Board oversight demonstrates governance commitment.
sectionBNotApproved.suggestedActionTemplate: Present the {{shortName}} policy to the board for formal approval. Document the resolution.

sectionBNoGrievance.descriptionTemplate: No grievance redressal mechanism found for {{name}}.
sectionBNoGrievance.suggestedActionTemplate: Implement a formal grievance channel and disclose the mechanism, escalation matrix, and resolution timelines.

sectionCLowScore.descriptionTemplate: {{name}} has a low disclosure rate. Many essential indicators are missing.
sectionCLowScore.suggestedActionTemplate: Systematically address each undisclosed indicator. Focus on essential indicators first for maximum score impact.

sectionCMissingLeadership.descriptionTemplate: No leadership indicators disclosed for {{name}}. These indicate advanced maturity.
sectionCMissingLeadership.suggestedActionTemplate: Begin tracking and disclosing leadership-level metrics. These differentiate "Established" from "Leading" maturity.
